---
title: "Russell Goebel"
listing:
  - id: recent-posts
    contents: posts
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    max-items: 3
---

I'm a statistician with a PhD from Boston University. I work on Bayesian 
spatial modeling and have spent several years doing applied consulting 
across health, life sciences, and other domains.

This site is where I write about statistics and whatever else I'm thinking about.

## Recent Writing
::: {#recent-posts}
:::

## Featured

**[Area-to-Area Spatial Prediction](slides/fastblm_and_spatintegrate.qmd)**

A walkthrough of `fastblm` and `spatintegrate` for satellite SIF downscaling — raster SAR models, Fourier-Matérn priors, and area-to-area kriging.
